description: Qaraite formulary for a bill of debt drawn up in the city of Sh[ām = Damascus?]. (There is also some text that seems like it is more appropriate for a letter than a legal deed above this.) On verso there are some Hebrew blessings.
description_he: נוסחה קראית לשטר חוב שנוצר בעיר ש[ם = דמשק?]. בגב: ברכות בעברית.
